forecast.day_comments: A 30 percent chance of snow, mainly after 3am.  Mostly cloudy, with a low around 20. Northeast wind 5 to 8 mph.  Total nighttime snow accumulation of less than a half inch possible.
forecast.night_comments: Snow likely, mainly between 7am and 2pm.  Areas of blowing snow after 11am. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 26. North wind 10 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph.  Chance of precipitation is 70%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 2 inches possible.
